overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a rural dirt path at night. The character passes stone walls, luminescent flora, a small stone bridge, a campsite with NPCs, and enters a forested area under a dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path alongside stone walls with luminescent flora

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with swords on his back, passing glowing plants and stone walls

entered.detail: low stone wall running parallel to the path on the left side
colorful glowing plants and flowers emitting pink, yellow, and blue light
winding dirt trail through grassy terrain
small rustic building with triangular thatched roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a rural dirt path at night, bordered by a stone wall on the left and open grassland on the right. Luminescent plants glow with otherworldly colors along the wall, and a distant thatched hut is visible against the dark blue night sky.

events.description: approaching and crossing the small stone bridge over water

agents.ego_description: Geralt crossing the stone bridge, continuing along the path as it curves slightly

entered.detail: small stone bridge with low walls spanning a narrow waterway
dark water visible beneath the bridge crossing
simple wooden post fence lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path leads to a small stone bridge over water. As Geralt crosses, the stone wall shifts from the left to the right side of the path. Wooden fences appear along the route, and the luminescent plants fade from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite with burning fire alongside the path

events.description: passing a campsite with burning fire and NPCs gathered near wooden barricades

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking past a campsite with a burning fire, observing the NPCs near the wooden fortifications

notable_agents.action: several figures standing and sitting around the campfire near wooden barricades

entered.detail: burning fire providing warm orange light against the cool night
rough wooden fence and barrier structure surrounding the camp area
temporary settlement with tents and supplies visible near the fire

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues along the path past open fields, approaching a campsite with a burning fire on the right. NPCs gather near wooden barricades around the fire. The stone wall shifts back to the left side as the path curves past the encampment.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail with dense tree canopy

events.description: entering the darker forested area with dense tree cover overhead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking deeper into the forest along the winding dirt path, surrounded by dense trees

entered.detail: tall trees forming a dense woodland on both sides of the path
tree branches and leaves forming a partial roof over the trail

segments.scene_description: The path enters a dense forest where trees form an overhead canopy, blocking much of the night sky. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed as Geralt continues along the winding trail, leaving the open fields and campsite behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural night path that transitions from an open, luminescent landscape into a dark, enclosed forest. It begins with Geralt walking beside a stone wall adorned with glowing plants, with a distant thatched hut visible under a deep blue sky. As the camera follows him across a small stone bridge, the luminescent flora fades and the stone wall shifts to the right, giving way to wooden fences. The scene then opens into wide fields where the path curves past a burning campsite and NPCs gathered behind wooden barricades before the stone wall returns to the left. Finally, the environment shifts as the trail enters a dense forest, where a heavy canopy of trees closes in and obscures the night sky.
